memoryArtifacts.description:
John Clifford, 7th Baron de Clifford
Born	c. 1389
Appleby Castle, Westmorland, England.
Died	13 March 1422 (Killed at the Siege of Meaux)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Clifford於1389年出生在英國達勒姆哈特時，他的父親Thomas Clifford27歲，母親Elizabeth de Ros24歲。他於1404年與Elizabeth Percy在英國諾福爾可費爾布利格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國維斯特莫藍德被列為high sheriff of westmorland。他去世於1422年3月13日在法國迪瑟 德 米奧享年33歲，埋葬在英國越可爾博爾頓 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Clifford于1389年出生在英国達勒姆哈特时，他的父亲Thomas Clifford27岁，母亲Elizabeth de Ros24岁。他于1404年与Elizabeth Percy在英国諾福爾可費爾布利格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国維斯特莫藍德被列为high sheriff of westmorland。他去世于1422年3月13日在法国迪瑟 德 米奧享年33岁，埋葬在英国越可爾博爾頓 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Clifford was born in 1389, in Hart, Durham, England, his father, Thomas Clifford, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth de Ros, was 24. He married Elizabeth Percy in 1404, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as high sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England. He died on 13 March 1422, in Diocese of Meaux, France, at the age of 33, and was buried in Bolton Abbey, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Clifford est né en 1389, à Hart, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Clifford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Ros, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Percy en 1404, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of westmorland à Westmorland, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1422, à Diocèse de Meaux, France, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Bolton Abbey, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Clifford 1389 in Hart, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Clifford 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Ros 24. Er hat 1404 in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England Elizabeth Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als high sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. März 1422 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Diocèse de Meaux, Frankreich und wurde in Bolton Abbey, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clifford è nato il nel 1389 nel Hart, Durham, England, il suo padre, Thomas Clifford, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Ros, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Percy nel 1404, nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of westmorland nel Westmorland, England. Morì il 13 marzo 1422, nel Diocèse de Meaux, Francia, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Bolton Abbey, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cliffordが1389年にイギリスダルハムハートで生まれた時，父Thomas Cliffordは27歳，母Elizabeth de Rosは24歳であった。1404年にイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググでElizabeth Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスウエストモーランドでの職業はhigh sheriff of westmorlandと記録されている。彼は1422年3月13日にフランスディオクeゼ ド メアウックスで33歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Clifford(이)가 1389년 영국 뒤람 하트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Clifford(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ros(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1404년 영국 노르폴크 프브리그에서 Elizabeth Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 high sheriff of westmorland이었다. 그는 1422년 3월 13일 프랑스 디오ce스 데 모스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clifford nasceu em 1389, em Hart, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Clifford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Ros, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Percy em 1404, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of westmorland em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1422, em Diocèse de Meaux, França, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Bolton Abbey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Clifford родился в 1389 г. в местности харт, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Clifford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Ros, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Percy в 1404 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии high sheriff of westmorland в местности вестморланд, Англия. Он умер 13 марта 1422 г. в местности диокeс де мокс, Франция в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности болтон эбби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Clifford nació en 1389, en Hart, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Clifford, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Ros, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Percy en 1404, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of westmorland en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1422, en Diocèse de Meaux, Francia, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Bolton Abbey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
